lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਰਖਿ ਰਖਿ ਚਰਣ ਹਰਿ ਤਾਲ ਪੂਰਈਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: har har usatat karai din raatee rakh rakh charan har taal pooreea |5|
lines.english: I praise the Lord, day and night, moving my feet to the beat of the drum. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਧਾਰ ਚੁਐ ਅਤਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜਿਨਿ ਪੀਆ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਲਹੀਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: nij ghar dhaar chuai at niramal jin peea tin hee sukh laheea |6|
lines.english: The stream of immaculate purity flows through the home of the self within; one who drinks it in, finds peace. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਗਾਵੈ ਰਸਿ ਰਸਾਲ ਰਸਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਰਵਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: har kai rang rataa man gaavai ras rasaal ras sabad raveea |
lines.english: Imbued with the Lord's Love, my mind sings His Praise, joyfully chanting the Shabad, the source of nectar and bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹਠਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਰੈ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੀ ਜਿਉ ਬਾਲਕ ਬਾਲੂ ਘਰ ਉਸਰਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: manahatth karam karai abhimaanee jiau baalak baaloo ghar usareea |
lines.english: The stubborn-minded, egotistical, proud-minded person performs rituals, but these are like sand castles built by children.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵੈ ਲਹਰਿ ਸਮੁੰਦ ਸਾਗਰ ਕੀ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਭਿੰਨ ਭਿੰਨ ਢਹਿ ਪਈਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: aavai lehar samund saagar kee khin meh bhin bhin dteh peea |7|
lines.english: When the waves of the ocean come in, they crumble and dissolve in an instant. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਰੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਹੈ ਸਭੁ ਖੇਲੁ ਖੇਲਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: har sar saagar har hai aape ihu jag hai sabh khel kheleea |
lines.english: The Lord is the pool, and the Lord Himself is the ocean; this world is all a play which He has staged.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਲ ਤਰੰਗ ਜਲੁ ਜਲਹਿ ਸਮਾਵਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਰਮਈਆ ॥੮॥੩॥੬॥
lines.translit: jiau jal tarang jal jaleh samaaveh naanak aape aap rameea |8|3|6|
lines.english: As the waves of water merge into the water again, O Nanak, so does He merge into Himself. ||8||3||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਰਚੈ ਮਨਿ ਮੁੰਦ੍ਰਾ ਪਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਤਨਿ ਭਸਮ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur parachai man mundraa paaee gur kaa sabad tan bhasam drirreea |
lines.english: My mind wears the ear-rings of the True Guru's acquaintance; I apply the ashes of the Word of the Guru's Shabad to my body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: mere man saadhasangat mil raheea |
lines.english: O my mind, remain united with the Saadh Sangat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਰ ਪਿੰਡ ਭਏ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੋਊ ਮਿਟਿ ਗਈਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: amar pindd bhe saadhoo sang janam maran doaoo mitt geea |1|
lines.english: My body has become immortal, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. Both birth and death have come to an end for me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਮਧਸੂਦਨ ਮਾਧਉ ਮੈ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਚਰਣ ਪਖਈਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kripaa karahu madhasoodan maadhau mai khin khin saadhoo charan pakheea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Be merciful to me, O Lord; each and every instant, let me wash the Feet of the Holy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਵਤੁ ਧਾਇ ਤਦੇ ਘਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਵਈਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dhaavat dhaae tade ghar aavai har har saadhoo saran paveea |2|
lines.english: The wandering mind returns home, only when it seeks the Sanctuary of the Lord's Holy people. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜੈ ਗਿਰਸਤੁ ਭਇਆ ਬਨ ਵਾਸੀ ਇਕੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਟਿਕੈ ਨ ਟਿਕਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: tajai girasat bheaa ban vaasee ik khin manooaa ttikai na ttikeea |
lines.english: Forsaking family life, he wanders in the forest, but his mind does not remain at rest, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੀਆ ਪੂਤ ਛੋਡਿ ਸੰਨਿਆਸੀ ਆਸਾ ਆਸ ਮਨਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਕਰਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: dheea poot chhodd saniaasee aasaa aas man bahut kareea |
lines.english: The Sannyaasi renounces his daughters and sons, but his mind still conjures up all sorts of hopes and desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਜੀ ਤਰਕ ਦਿਗੰਬਰੁ ਹੋਆ ਮਨੁ ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਚਲਿ ਚਲਿ ਗਵਨੁ ਕਰਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: aupajee tarak diganbar hoaa man deh dis chal chal gavan kareea |
lines.english: When detachment from the world wells up within, he become a naked hermit, but still, his mind roams, wanders and rambles in the ten directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਆਸ ਕਰੈ ਨਹੀ ਬੂਝੈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਰਾਸ ਸੁਖੁ ਲਹੀਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aasaa aas karai nahee boojhai gur kai sabad niraas sukh laheea |3|
lines.english: With these hopes and desires, he still does not understand, that only through the Word of the Guru's Shabad does one become free of desires, and find peace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਵਨੁ ਕਰੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਨਹੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਧ ਦਇਆ ਘਰੁ ਲਹੀਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: prabhavan karai boojhai nahee trisanaa mil sang saadh deaa ghar laheea |4|
lines.english: He wanders around, but his desires are not satisfied; joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, he finds the house of kindness and compassion. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਣ ਸਿਧ ਸਿਖਹਿ ਬਹੁਤੇਰੇ ਮਨਿ ਮਾਗਹਿ ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਚੇਟਕ ਚੇਟਕਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: aasan sidh sikheh bahutere man maageh ridh sidh chettak chettakeea |
lines.english: The Siddhas learn many Yogis postures, but their minds still yearn for riches, miraculous powers and energy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਡਜ ਜੇਰਜ ਸੇਤਜ ਉਤਭੁਜ ਸਭਿ ਵਰਨ ਰੂਪ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਉਪਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: anddaj jeraj setaj utabhuj sabh varan roop jeea jant upeea |
lines.english: Life is born from the egg, from the womb, from sweat and from the earth; God created the beings and creatures of all colors and forms.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਮਨਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਪਈਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: tripat santokh man saant na aavai mil saadhoo tripat har naam sidh peea |5|
lines.english: Satisfaction, contentment and tranquility do not come to their minds; but meeting the Holy Saints, they are satisfied, and through the Name of the Lord, spiritual perfection is attained. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰੈ ਸੋ ਉਬਰੈ ਖਤ੍ਰੀ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣੁ ਸੂਦੁ ਵੈਸੁ ਚੰਡਾਲੁ ਚੰਡਈਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: saadhoo saran parai so ubarai khatree braahaman sood vais chanddaal chanddeea |6|
lines.english: One who seeks the Sanctuary of the Holy is saved, whether he is a Kh'shaatriya, a Brahmin, a Soodra, a Vaishya or the most untouchable of the untouchables. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਾਧੂ ਜਨ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨਾ ਜਟੁ ਸੈਣੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਦਈਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jo jo milai saadhoo jan sangat dhan dhanaa jatt sain miliaa har deea |7|
lines.english: blessed Dhanna and Sain; all those who joined the humble Saadh Sangat, met the Merciful Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਾ ਜੈਦੇਉ ਕੰਬੀਰੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਲੋਚਨੁ ਅਉਜਾਤਿ ਰਵਿਦਾਸੁ ਚਮਿਆਰੁ ਚਮਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: naamaa jaideo kanbeer trilochan aaujaat ravidaas chamiaar chameea |
lines.english: Naam Dayv, Jai Dayv, Kabeer, Trilochan and Ravi Daas the low-caste leather-worker,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਹਰਿ ਪੈਜ ਰਖਾਈ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਅੰਗੀਕਾਰੁ ਕਰਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kee har paij rakhaaee bhagat vachhal angeekaar kareea |
lines.english: The Lord protects the honor of His humble servants; He is the Lover of His devotees - He makes them His own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰੇ ਜਗਜੀਵਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ਰਖਈਆ ॥੮॥੪॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak saran pare jagajeevan har har kirapaa dhaar rakheea |8|4|7|
lines.english: Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of the Lord, the Life of the world, who has showered His Mercy upon him, and saved him. ||8||||4||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪਿਆਸ ਉਠੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇਰੀ ਸੁਣਿ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨ ਮਨਿ ਤੀਰ ਲਗਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: antar piaas utthee prabh keree sun gur bachan man teer lageea |
lines.english: The thirst for God has welled up deep within me; hearing the Word of the Guru's Teachings, my mind is pierced by His arrow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fourth Mehl:
